message:
Command `SYNTH_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis"

echo "=== Contents of synthesis step dir ==="
ls -lh "$SYNTH_DIR/" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Yosys process system calls (via /proc) ==="
# Check what Yosys is working on via /proc/PID/status
cat /proc/216314/status 2>/dev/null | head -20

echo ""
echo "=== What files does yosys have open? ==="
ls -la /proc/216314/fd 2>/dev/null | head -20

echo ""
echo "=== Current stack/syscall of yosys ==="
cat /proc/216314/wchan 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.
